claim_title: Ghost projection runner is referenced but missing

results.description: Verify canonical runner exists and remains referenced by project documentation.
results.command: refs=$(rg -n "scripts/projections/run_all_projections.py" AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md README.md DEVELOPMENT_TRACKER.md docs/INDEX.md docs/reviews -g "*.md" | wc -l || true); exists=0; [ -f scripts/projections/run_all_projections.py ] && exists=1; echo "DOC_REF_COUNT=$refs"; echo "FILE_EXISTS=$exists"; if [ "$refs" -ge 1 ] && [ "$exists" -eq 1 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
